title: Update app title/heading to 'Professional Esports Tournament's App'

requirements.text: In the Hero section, replace the subtitle/tagline text that currently reads 'Professional eSports organization' with 'Professional Esports Tournament's App'. Target the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[1] — this corresponds to a text block inside HeroSection.tsx. Update only this specific text node; do not change any other content.

quotes: Ki jagha likho Professional Esports Tournament's App

acceptanceCriteria: The selected element in the Hero section displays the text 'Professional Esports Tournament's App'
The text 'Professional eSports organization' no longer appears in that element
No other sections or components are altered

constraints: Only modify the single text node identified by the provided XPath in HeroSection.tsx
Do not alter layout, styling, or any other content
nonGoals: Changing any other headings or labels across the app
